fn unsafe_slice_from_raw(ptr: *const u8, len: usize) -> &'static [u8] {
    unsafe { std::slice::from_raw_parts(ptr, len) }
}

fn unsafe_mut_slice(ptr: *mut u8, len: usize) -> &'static mut [u8] {
    unsafe { std::slice::from_raw_parts_mut(ptr, len) }
}

fn create_vec_from_raw(ptr: *mut u32, len: usize) -> Vec<u32> {
    unsafe { Vec::from_raw_parts(ptr, len, len) }
}

fn reinterpret_bytes(data: &[u8]) -> &[u32] {
    let ptr = data.as_ptr() as *const u32;
    let len = data.len() / 4;
    unsafe { std::slice::from_raw_parts(ptr, len) }
}
